title: The HSA Triple Tax Trick Costing You $395,000
hook: Most people swipe their HSA card at the doctor and call it a day — but there's a triple tax-free trick inside it worth nearly $400,000, and 68% of Americans are leaving it on the table.
angle: Exposes the massive wealth-building potential of investing HSA funds rather than spending them, revealing the triple tax advantage and its 30-year compounding effect most people never discover
audience: Employees with HSA-eligible health plans, anyone in their 30s-50s building retirement wealth
key_numbers: 68%: of HSA holders never invest their balance
$395,000: what $4,150/year invested at 7% for 30 years becomes
65: age when HSA becomes a second IRA with penalty-free withdrawals for anything
